data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of exit triggers: booking made, purchase completed, and link clicked. While there is evidence of a booking being made (evidence from 'customer-book-primary' step), there is no evidence provided for the purchase completion or link clicking. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as not all exit triggers are validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate purchase completion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that a purchase has been completed for the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate link click tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the link associated with the booking has been clicked.
